src/main/java/com/example/demo/logging/S.general_idea: Enhance logging output to include the HTTP method alongside the URI for better request traceability.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Extract JWT filter instantiation into separate methods to pass dependencies explicitly, removing reliance on adapter methods.
Update the list of permitted URL patterns to reflect new API paths and remove static asset patterns.
Introduce environment property support for dynamic CORS origin configuration.
Extract token extraction and username parsing into separate private methods to improve modularity and testability.
Remove unused import java.util.Objects after refactoring null checks to use standard operators.
Update the base request mapping path to include API versioning.
